task_completion.description: The docker-compose.yml file is updated to include the MinIO service with the correct image and command.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing docker-compose.yml with a 'minio' service block containing 'image: minio/minio' and 'command: server /data --console-address ":9001"'.

task_completion.description: The web service in docker-compose.yml is configured with the required AWS/S3 environment variables.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing the 'web' service block in docker-compose.yml with 'S3_ENDPOINT_URL', 'AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID', and 'AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY' environment variables pointing to the MinIO service.

task_completion.description: Automation is added to ensure the 'company-assets' bucket is created when the stack starts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing a setup script, an entrypoint modification, or an additional service (like minio/mc) in docker-compose.yml that explicitly creates the 'company-assets' bucket.

task_completion.description: The Docker Compose stack is successfully started with both web and minio services.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing 'docker compose up' logs or 'docker ps' listing both the web and minio containers in a running state.

task_completion.description: The Flask application successfully uploads a file to the MinIO bucket.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser navigated to http://localhost:5000 showing a successful file upload message, or terminal output showing a successful curl request/boto3 log confirming the upload.

integrity.description: The agent used a real text editor to modify the project files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using an editor like VS Code, nano, or vim to edit docker-compose.yml, rather than just echoing text into the file blindly.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely started the Docker Compose stack.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal displays actual Docker build/pull/start logs, proving the agent didn't just type the command without executing it.

integrity.description: The agent actively tested the file upload functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used a web browser or a terminal command (like curl) to interact with localhost:5000 and trigger an upload, rather than just writing the code and assuming it works.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project directory is '/home/ga/s3-project'. The expected services in the docker-compose stack are 'web' and 'minio'. The target bucket name that must be automatically created and used for uploads is 'company-assets'.
